rulings.Case Title: LUZ AL-DIJAILI ET AL VS. SHREE JALARAMBAPA HOTEL, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2018, Line 1. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF KENNETH PRICE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. GRANTED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JESSICA KOERNER ET AL VS. DENNIS GALLAGHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Profits And Financial Condition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFFS JESSICA KOERNER, DANNY FREEMAN'S Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Profits And Financial Condition. DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to establish a substantial probability they will prevail on a claim for punitive damages per CCP § 3495(c). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rey S. Yang In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANTS MAY LEE, HOWARD LEE'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN E. WAI VS. PAUL OEI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN WAI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Adjudication. DENIED. Defendant raises triable issues of fact as to whether the storage units were housing services within the meaning of SF Rent Ordinance. Moreover, Plaintiff failed to shift the burden as to Defendant's other affirmative defenses. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. RYAN MORALES ET AL
